title: How to update the e-mail column from incoming e-mail
excerpt: Hi, we would really like to know a way to update the e-mail column on our board, which has the integration with gmail, by pulling the address from the body of the incoming e-mail, as shown in the images.

posts.author: hubdobem (hub do bem)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, we would really like to know a way to update the e-mail column on our board, which has the integration with gmail, by pulling the address from the body of the incoming e-mail, as shown in the images.

Screen Shot 2022-06-22 at 21.34.272190×516 82.1 KB

Screen Shot 2022-06-22 at 21.34.401092×1416 95.7 KB

posts.author: Silas (Silas G.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, im searching for the same solution. I cant belive that there is no way jet to fill up automaticly the email column by receved mails.
I do need this feature for an ticketsystem witch supports two channels (form and email).

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Silas @hubdobem I’m happy to share that extract, a monday marketplace app is solving the pain of extracting email addresses from board updates into board items (and files too!) you cna check it out here. Happy to het your feedback.
